actually role in the adas area for the k9 mi-vie project at stellantis plant in vigo. officialization process of the evolutions of the parts of this area applicable to the entire project. follow up and management of the information related to officalizations, issues appeared in the cars, tests and any change affecting adas parts. role in the resolution of the issues appared on the cars tested in vigo plant. such issues could affect software, hardware and calibration of the pieces. task together with develop team. bachelor in aerospace systems engineering. mention in air navigation. universitat politécnica de catalunya - barcelona tech - upc 2016-2021 some interesting projects carried during my university stage: + programming projects using python and matlab. adopt an airport project: application of different regulations to airtraffic at the washington airport (iad), developed in matlab code. designing projects of pieces and mechanisms developed with solidworks. final degree project: design of an on-board flight tracking service forpassengers in real time by configuring a raspberry pi board and an on- board gps receiver.
